---
title: "Who we are"
format:
  html:
    css: styles_the4.css
---

We developed this project for ISSS608 (Visual Analytics and Applications) during Academic Year 2025-26 in Singapore Management University under the guidance of Dr. Kam Tin Seong, Associate Professor of Information Systems.

Members :

• [WEN POYANG](https://isss608vaa-ay2025.netlify.app/)

• [HE XIAOYI](https://isss608-ay2025-26g1.netlify.app)

• [ZHOU ZIYING](https://isss-608.vercel.app)
